statics.description: Each land with an everything counter on it is every land type in addition to its other types.
Each nonland creature with an everything counter on it is every creature type.

triggers.description: Whenever CARDNAME enters or attacks, put an everything counter on each of up to one target land and up to one target creature.
Whenever CARDNAME enters or attacks, put an everything counter on each of up to one target land and up to one target creature.
